name: zoon
description: Turn Codex Markdown drafts into collaborative Zoon documents for review, comments, and continued agent revision.

interface.shortDescription: Continue Codex Markdown drafts in Zoon
interface.longDescription: Zoon turns long Codex Markdown answers into collaborative documents. Use it when a user wants to continue editing a plan, spec, PRD, report, article, or multi-section analysis with in-document review, comments, suggestions, visible authorship, and later agent revisions in the same artifact.
defaultPrompt: Write this plan into a new Zoon doc
Turn this Markdown into a collaborative document
